text: Grandma: Hello! Little mouse!
Grandma: Interested in my wares?
Let me have a look...
Grandma:Please have a look!
Maybe next time...
Grandma:Save travel,little mouse!
Grandma: ...little mouse,you are a mammal,you must have been to the upper level right?
Grandma: Can you bring me some FLOWERS?
Grandma: You see, underground has no sun,all we can grow is mushrooms.
Grandma: I can give something valuable to you, if you can bring me some FLOWERS.
Grandma: Oh...It's been a while since I saw a mammal...
Grandma: Little mouse, do you want to buy some mushroom?
Let me have a look...
Grandma:Please have a look!
Maybe next time...
Grandma:Save travel,little mouse!
Mic:Can we go back yet,Captain?
Sif:For bugs sake...NO,we have to wait for orders.
Rigel:What happened?
Mic:A MOUSE!He looks so different from the books!Can I touch your tail?Please!!
Sif:Stop it,mic!
Sif:(whispers)A mammal,what an unlucky day...
Sif:None of your business,mammal.Leave.
Rigel:It seems there was a murder,a Cyberpsychosis,of course...
Sif:Ho...How do you know?We have already moved the body away!
Rigel:I have seem lots of scenes like this,trust me.
Mic:Can I touch your fluffy tail?Please!!
Sif:Please,mic!

Sif:You are right,this morning,we receieved a report that someone is murdered under plain sight.When I and my team reached here,the body was so awlful that I can barely recognize which spieces he was...
Sif:...It took some time for our specialist to know that the murder has Cyberpsychosis but you just took a glance...
Sif:You can't be some normal mammal as far as I can tell,so if you can help,We would be grateful.
Sif:Try heading west of the RUST CITY,some of my team has already traced there.
Rigel:It's so dangerous to let a Cyberpsychos on the run,I should move now.
Mic:(Looking at Rigel without a blink)
Sif:Safty travel,little mammal.
Mic:Safe...traveling!
Raccoon:Want a drink?
Worker: Get off,dirty mammal.
Rigel:( fierce panting ) Shit...
Rigel:Even if they lost the war,their experimentals are getting much better than I last fought them.
Rigel:Maybe after 5 years, I will have no chance against these monsters.
Rigel:I have to do something.
Lion:Good,you came.
Lion:Recently our intel team has captured an encrypted message that the bugs are doing large-scale experiment about military-grade cyberlimb.
Lion:We fear they are planning their next invasion.
Lion:In this situation,sending a diplomat team is not a wise choice.
Lion:So we are asking you to go on a private investigation.
Lion:Good hunting,Rigel.
Lion:Any Qusetion?
Where are they doing this experiment?
Lion:According to our intel team,the main focus is in the RUST CITY,the heart of their industrial complex.
Lion:There should be a secret lab there,We need you to gather the information,and find a way to infiltrate.
What exactly are they working on?
Lion:We can't tell so far,but it seems they are developing BIOLOGICAL WEAPON for their soilders.
Lion:...that are capable to destroy mammal's biological structure in a second.
I'm ready.
Lion:Good.
Lion:We will provide you an ID card that will allow you to enter and exit RUST CITY at any time.
Lion:Also,some money will be transferred to your account,use it wisely before the operation.
Lion:And...
Lion:...Maybe this is a bad time to mention...
Lion:Rigel,do you remember "CINDERTAIL"?
Rigel:How can I forget this name?I make bad dreams about him endlessly after the war.
Lion:Yes,"Cindertail"...the bug who killed MEISSA,the captain of ORION.
Lion:He reappeared...after a long disappearence since the end of the war.
Rigel:I won't fail this time,I will clear my magzine through his throat...
Rigel:I traced him for entire 7 years and he finally appeared...
Lion:Clam down,young mouse.
Lion:I understand your feeling,I lost my brother on the battlefield half century ago.
Lion:But the lust of revenge,will only consume you,don't let it cloud your mind.
Lion:Tell me when you are ready,Dismiss.
Lion:How's the preparation?
I need more time.
Lion:Take your time,little mouse.
I'm ready for the mission.
Lion:Good.
Lion:We can't send you into the rust city officially,but we can send you near the city.
Rigel:And I have to find a way into the city,right?
Lion:That's correct.As always.
Lion:This way.
Zig:STAND RIGHT THERE,mammal.
Zig:Disarm all your Communication systems.RIGHT NOW.
Zig:If I can see a single device transferring data with outside,my companion will shoot you to a hornet.
Rigel:Okay,Okay!Relax,All comms down!
Zig:Wise choice.You have been sniffing around the lab.Who are you,and what do you want?
Rigel:Name's Sam,have been a chip trafficker for many years,you can check my ID.
Rigel:And don't need to worry about me,I want to enter the lab same as your guys,we can collaborate.
Zag:boss,How...
Zig:Trafficker always know how to negotiate,eh?True,I am a humble merchant who "borrows" other's good ware too,same as you.
Zig:Recently the lab is doing something big,very big.My boys told me thousands of valuable material are transported there everyday.
Zig:It's risky,but if we can manage to "borrow" a tiny portion of it...I can't even imagine!!
Zig:But business is business,to prove your capability,we need you to do something for us,and we can discuss more after that.
Rigel:(Here we go again...)
Zig:I need a special chip that can see through the wall of the lab,without it,it would be reckless to proceed.
Zig:This can be circulated in the black market of your mammal country...
Zig:...or you can "borrow" it from the leaders of the local gang in the deep sewers,one of them must have it.
Zig:I will send you my code,contact me once you finished.
Zig:Good Luck.
Zag:A word,boss?
Zig:Zag,This is not the right time!
Zag:It's about Sam,the way he fought,it's nothing I have seemed before.
Zag:I have been in the army for a couple of years,and I saw lots of fights.This...This is something I have NEVER seem before.
Zag:His movement,his way of using weapons and tactics...it's ART.
Zag:Like playing a chess game,he can always kill opponent's general with the shortest steps.
Zag:I dare to say that if we have someone like him during the war,maybe tide of the war would have been on our side.
Zig:What the hell?!Zag,are you speaking for dirty mammals?
Zig:But it does make sense.How can a trafficker fought so well?How did he know what we wanted to do at the first place?
Zig:Things are getting more interesting,we just keep playing with him,I want to see how this ends...
Zig:hehehehe...
CinderTail:Finally,you came.
Rigel:Captain?Captain!!
Captain:Run...Rigel...
CinderTail:Looks like your Captain's life maintanence system is failing.
CinderTail:His lung is broken and oxygen is running out.5 minutes.If you can beat me in 5 minutes,maybe your captain will live.
CinderTail:Or you can walk away now,I will pretend nothing happened.
Rigel:Captain!!Arhhhhhhhhh!!!!
Captain:Run...
CinderTail:Calm down,little mouse,anger can solve nothing.
CinderTail:Let's dance.
CinderTail:Not bad,not bad at all.
CinderTail:You almost got me,little mouse.Almost.
CinderTail:Looks like there are valuable implants in you.
CinderTail:Preparing for a throughal autopsy,little mouse,hehehe....
Rigel:Captain!!!
Rigel:......
Rigel:Another bad dream...
Rigel:Even the war is ended 7 years ago,the past is still torturing me.
Rigel:Let's get up.
Rigel:This photo is taken before the war...
Rigel:ORION...A special force that consisted of nine best warriors from the country.I was one of them.
Rigel:...and I am the only one who lived.
Rigel:Every time I look at the picture,I feel like they are watching me from the hell.
Rigel:This is a curse,and I have to live with that curse for the rest of my life...
Rigel:So the lab is still in the center of the city.
Rigel:The lab is so big...stretching to the top of the underground strcture.
Rigel:The lab itself is not hard to find,the question is,how do I get in?
Rigel:I will run a scan around the site,see what can I find.
Rigel:...
Rigel:I have to admit how astonishing their security system is,even the cutting-edge infiltration drone can't get in.
Rigel:Since the material of the architecture,I can't even see through the wall.
Rigel:So we can't get in by normal ways.
Rigel:There must be some way to get in.
Rigel:I will gather some information in the city.
Rigel:Everyone,Keep pushing,we are closing to the fort.
Meissa:Rigel,can you hear me?
Rigel:Yes,Captain.
Meissa:Me and Bear are moving close to the fort.ETA in 10 minutes.
Meissa:Enemy's fire power is stronger on your side,so proceed with caution.
Rigel:Roger that.
Rigel:Let's move to the coordination.
Meissa:(Scream and Gunfire)
Meissa:something is not right here,we have been sent to the trap!
Meissa:We are being ambushed,Rigel,don't go to that coordination!I repeat...
Rigel:Captain,you are okay?
Rigel:Captain!
Rigel:We have to save him!
Soilder A:This is suicide,we have to retreat!
Soilder B:We didn't rest since last night.I can't..,
Rigel:This is an order!Captain always treats you well,this is how you repay him?
Soilder A:But...
Rigel:I said,this is an ORDER.Follow me.
Simon:Uncle Rigel!
Rigel:Simon? It's 9 P.M. you should be at school!
Simon:But I don't want to go there!All we do in the class is hearing teacher repeating the E-books!
Simon:Please,uncle rigel!!! Let me stay at your shop!
Simon:You told me you escape from class at my age,right?
Rigel:Yes,my elder brother was very mad at me...
Simon:See?You don't have the right to tell me to go to the school.
Rigel:But escape from school is not right,only this time,and don't tell anyone,okay?
Simon:Uncle Rigel!You are the best!
Rigel:There's a huge update in "Star Farer", Let's play.
Simon:Uncle Rigel,you have an elder brother?
Rigel:Yes...but we don't have any blood ties,he's a rabbit.
Simon:Cool!So you are in the same school?
Rigel:Yes...in some ways.
Rigel:He was good at almost everything,but your uncle Rigel...He skipped classes.
Simon:As am I,now we are on the same boat,uncle Rigel!
Simon:So is your brother doing fine?Can I meet him?
Rigel:He...diappeared during the war,I tried to find him...but with no avail.
Simon:Oh...I'm sorry to hear that,uncle Rigel.
Rigel:It's okay...Hey,there's a boss fight ahead,no sad words!
Simon:Roger that,uncle Rigel!
Simon:WOW!Uncle Rigel!You just shoot the boss down from the sky,how did you do that?
Rigel:I have talent in shooting,I was in the shooting club back in the school.
Simon:That's so cool!I can't beat the boss with my other 3 friends with the legendary equipment, but you can do it singlehandly with a common gun!
Rigel:Well...I have been playing shooting games for a long time...
Simon's Mom:Simon?
Simon:Coming,Mom!
Simon's Mom:Rigel,thank you again for taking care of Simon while I am working,is he doing fine?
Rigel:Y...Yes,he told me he got first place at the swimming lesson today.
Simon:(Wink at Rigel)Yes,it was tense!
Simon's Mom:That is my good boy!
Regel:How is your new job in neon city,Mrs. Simon?
Simon's Mom:Well...My boss is a good mammal,he is very kind to me and I am learning a lot from him.Thanks for asking.
Rigel:That's good to hear.See you tomorrow!
Simon:Bye,uncle Rigel!See you tomorrow!
Rigel:It's 6 P.M. already,I will close the shop and grab a drink at the bar,the nightmare was so real...
Raccoon:A Neon Legend?
Rigel:With L size.
Raccoon:Had a nightmare again,hadn't you?
Rigel:Yes,But this time was so real,it's just like the dream is extracted from my memory.
Raccoon:It's about MEISSA,right?
Rigel:Yeah...I saw the life ran out his eyes slowly but I couldn't do anything.
Rigel:And that wrong coordination,captain is always cautious...how did he walked into that trap?
Raccoon:But he's not certainly dead,is he?Official announced his death after 3 years of searching but didn't find his BODY.
Rigel:I searched everywhere I can but didn't find a single clue.
Raccoon:You want to hear my opinion?
Rigel;What's that?
Raccoon:I believe he's still alive,I think there's a reason that he didn't come out.
Raccoon:I was served at A01 Battalion during the war,I saw how he fight in the battlefield.
Raccoon:He's always calm and cunning,and planted with cutting-edge implants,he can't die that easily.
Raccoon:If the bugs got him,they would propogate this in their media,but they didn't,which is werid.
Rigel:Yeah,you are right...
Raccoon:Holding up,Rigel.Meissa don't want to see you like this.
Raccoon:After all,you are the last member of the ORION.The hero of mammal country.
Rigel:...
Rigel:It's late now,better go home...
